role: Issue template definitions for the ArchSpine project.
responsibility: Defines structured issue templates (bug reports, feature requests, documentation improvements, and repository configuration) that guide contributors to submit consistent, complete, and actionable feedback for the ArchSpine project.

children.role: Defines the issue template behavior for the ArchSpine repository, guiding contributors toward appropriate communication channels.
Issue template for collecting documentation improvement suggestions in the ArchSpine project
Defines a structured template for submitting feature requests to the ArchSpine project, standardizing the format and required information from contributors.
